content.verdict: LVMH's flagship Maldivian hideaway in Noonu Atoll is arguably the most polished barefoot-luxury experience in the country. With only 45 villas, a dedicated Alain Ducasse-influenced culinary program, and the White 1921 spa, it delivers a honeymoon that feels both intimate and unforgettable.
content.best_room: The Water Villa with private pool is the signature honeymoon choice — perched over a blue lagoon, it offers an over-water hammock, an outdoor shower under the stars, and direct reef access. For a splurge, the two-bedroom Owner's Villa rents an entire beach stretch.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Seaplane Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: Private transfer from Velana International via Cheval Blanc's seaplane lounge. Champagne welcome, villa orientation with your Alchemist (butler), sunset on your deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Reef & Lagoon Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Guided house-reef snorkel with the marine biologist, poolside lunch at Deelani, afternoon couples massage at the White 1921 spa.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Sandbank Picnic
itinerary_7_nights.description: Speedboat to a private sandbank with a chef-prepared lobster lunch and chilled Ruinart. Return for sunset cocktails at the Bar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Culinary Immersion
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning yoga pavilion session, cooking class with the executive chef, dinner at Le 1947 (the brand's fine-dining signature).

itinerary_7_nights.title: Ocean Adventure
itinerary_7_nights.description: Dive or snorkel safari to a nearby manta cleaning station, then a sunset dolphin dhoni cruise with canapés.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Wellness & Pampering
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full-day spa ritual — Guerlain facial, hammam, and Balinese massage for two — followed by in-villa teppanyaki dinner served by your Alchemist.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Slow breakfast on the deck, final lagoon swim, seaplane departure in a branded Cheval Blanc aircraft.

caveats: Seaplane transfers operate only in daylight; late arrivals overnight in Malé
Price excludes 10% service + 16% GST + green tax
Limited shade on some beach villas at midday

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — one of the top honeymoon choices in the Maldives thanks to its low villa count, private pools, and Alchemist butler service.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: January to April for dry, sunny weather and calm seas. May–October is greener and cheaper but wetter.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 6–9 months ahead, especially for Christmas, New Year, and February honeymoons.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No — children are welcome and there's a Paws Kids Club, but the resort remains refined and couples-heavy.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Water Villa with pool for honeymoons; Island Villa if you prefer direct beach access.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: 45-minute seaplane transfer from Malé Velana International Airport (MLE), included in the package.
